query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sequences (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  reply_detection BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  pause_on_reply BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  enrolled_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  completed_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  reply_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_by INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sequence_steps (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sequence_id INT NOT NULL,
  step_number INT NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email',
  subject VARCHAR(500),
  body TEXT,
  wait_days INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  wait_hours INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ab_variant_subject VARCHAR(500),
  ab_variant_body TEXT,
  ab_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sequence_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sequence_id INT NOT NULL,
  contact_id INT NOT NULL,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  current_step INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  next_send_at BIGINT,
  enrolled_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT,
  replied_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS journeys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  trigger_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  trigger_config JSON,
  nodes JSON,
  edges JSON,
  enrolled_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  completed_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_by INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS journey_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  journey_id INT NOT NULL,
  contact_id INT NOT NULL,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  current_node_id VARCHAR(64),
  enrolled_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS whatsapp_messages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  contact_id INT,
  phone VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  direction VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  message_id VARCHAR(128),
  media_url VARCHAR(1024),
  sent_by INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS whatsapp_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS social_posts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  platforms JSON NOT NULL,
  media_urls JSON,
  scheduled_at BIGINT,
  published_at BIGINT,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  linked_contact_id INT,
  linked_deal_id INT,
  platform_post_ids JSON,
  created_by INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS social_accounts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  platform VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  account_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  account_id VARCHAR(128),
  access_token TEXT,
  token_expires_at BIGINT,
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  connected_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dialer_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  contact_ids JSON NOT NULL,
  current_index INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  calls_made INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  calls_connected INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  calls_skipped INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  script TEXT,
  started_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS anomaly_alerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  severity VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  ai_explanation TEXT,
  metric VARCHAR(128),
  previous_value DOUBLE,
  current_value DOUBLE,
  change_percent DOUBLE,
  is_resolved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  resolved_at BIGINT,
  detected_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pipeline_inspections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  pipeline_id INT NOT NULL,
  health_score INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  stuck_deals_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  avg_days_in_stage JSON,
  velocity_score INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ai_insights TEXT,
  inspected_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS domain_auto_healing_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  domain VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  previous_limit INT,
  new_limit INT,
  triggered_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ab_test_runs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  campaign_id INT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
  variant_a JSON NOT NULL,
  variant_b JSON NOT NULL,
  split_percent INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  winner_variant VARCHAR(4),
  confidence_level DOUBLE,
  sent_a INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sent_b INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  opens_a INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  opens_b INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  clicks_a INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  clicks_b INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  replies_a INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  replies_b INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feature_tiers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  feature_key VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  feature_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  min_tier VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'starter',
  description TEXT,
  usage_limit INT,
  usage_unit VARCHAR(64)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feature_usage_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_company_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT,
  feature_key VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  usage_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  period_start BIGINT NOT NULL,
  period_end BIGINT NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute
